UserProgress.title: UserProgress
UserProgress.description: Saved game state and profile of the player bound to their Google auth credentials.

clickPowerLevel.description: Power level for each manual click

energyLevel.description: Upgrade level for max reserve energy

regenRate.description: Amount of energy restored per second

playerName.description: Google display name or chosen nickname

photoURL.description: Player chosen custom avatar photo URL or Base64 (optional)

notificationsEnabled.description: Whether Telegram Bot notifications are enabled (optional)

MarketplaceListing.title: MarketplaceListing
MarketplaceListing.description: P2P Marketplace item offered by a player in exchange for game coins.

itemImage.description: The URL for the item image

UserAction.title: UserAction
UserAction.description: Historical log entry of user activity and profile parameters for administrator tracking.

userId.description: The UID of the user who performed the action

coins.description: Coins balance at the moment of the action

totalClicks.description: Total clicks at the moment of action

playerClan.description: The clan name of the player

friendsCount.description: Number of friends the player has

/users/{userId}.description: Active game save directory indexed securely by Google Authentication UID

/marketplace/{listingId}.description: Active listings directory of general P2P items traded by players

/user_actions/{actionId}.description: Historical stream of player actions and stats logged for admin auditing
